title: LLM_REFORMULATION_ENDPOINT/API_KEY/MODEL env vars absent from ENV_REFERENCE
evidence: `const endpoint = process.env.LLM_REFORMULATION_ENDPOINT?.trim();` (line 204), `const apiKey = process.env.LLM_REFORMULATION_API_KEY?.trim() ?? '';` (line 210), `const model = process.env.LLM_REFORMULATION_MODEL?.trim() ?? 'gpt-4o-mini';` (line 211). These three non-prefixed env vars gate LLM query reformulation and HyDE (also used in hyde.ts:226-232 and memory-save.ts:1195) but ENV_REFERENCE.md only documents the SPECKIT_LLM_REFORMULATION feature flag (line 75), not the endpoint/key/model configuration triplet.
fix: Add a row for each of `LLM_REFORMULATION_ENDPOINT`, `LLM_REFORMULATION_API_KEY`, and `LLM_REFORMULATION_MODEL` to ENV_REFERENCE.md §5 (Query Intelligence), documenting them as the non-prefixed operator envs that configure the LLM backend for reformulation and HyDE.
angle: Extend ENV_REFERENCE drift checks beyond `SPECKIT_*` tokens to non-prefixed operator envs used by 028 search paths.

title: Seven MCP_* preflight config env vars missing from ENV_REFERENCE
evidence: `charsPerToken: parseFloat(process.env.MCP_CHARS_PER_TOKEN || '4')` (line 235), `max_tokens_per_memory: parseInt(process.env.MCP_MAX_MEMORY_TOKENS || '8000', 10)` (line 236), `warning_threshold: parseFloat(process.env.MCP_TOKEN_WARNING_THRESHOLD || '0.8')` (line 237), `min_content_length: parseInt(process.env.MCP_MIN_CONTENT_LENGTH || '10', 10)` (line 240), `max_content_length: parseInt(process.env.MCP_MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH || '250000', 10)` (line 241), `similar_duplicate_threshold: parseFloat(process.env.MCP_DUPLICATE_THRESHOLD || '0.95')` (line 245), `anchor_validation_strict: process.env.MCP_ANCHOR_STRICT === 'true'` (line 248). These control the save-time preflight quality gate — token budgets, content limits, duplicate detection — but none appear in ENV_REFERENCE.md.
fix: Add a new 'Preflight Configuration' subsection to ENV_REFERENCE.md documenting all seven MCP_* variables with their defaults, types, and source file reference.
angle: Extend ENV_REFERENCE drift checks beyond `SPECKIT_*` tokens to non-prefixed operator envs used by 028 search paths.

title: Six session-management env vars absent from ENV_REFERENCE
evidence: `sessionTtlMinutes: parseInt(process.env.SESSION_TTL_MINUTES as string, 10) || 30` (line 187), `maxEntriesPerSession: parseInt(process.env.SESSION_MAX_ENTRIES as string, 10) || 100` (line 188), `enabled: process.env.DISABLE_SESSION_DEDUP !== 'true'` (line 189), `dbUnavailableMode: process.env.SESSION_DEDUP_DB_UNAVAILABLE_MODE === 'allow' ? 'allow' : 'block'` (line 190), `STALE_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS = parseInt(process.env.STALE_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS as string, 10) || 60 * 60 * 1000` (line 204), `STALE_SESSION_THRESHOLD_MS = parseInt(process.env.STALE_SESSION_THRESHOLD_MS as string, 10) || 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000` (line 205). These control session dedup behavior, TTL, and stale cleanup — none in ENV_REFERENCE.md.
fix: Add a 'Session Management' subsection to ENV_REFERENCE.md documenting these six variables with defaults and the session-manager.ts source reference.
angle: Extend ENV_REFERENCE drift checks beyond `SPECKIT_*` tokens to non-prefixed operator envs used by 028 search paths.

title: MEMORY_ALLOWED_PATHS security-relevant env var not in ENV_REFERENCE
evidence: `const envPaths = process.env.MEMORY_ALLOWED_PATHS ? process.env.MEMORY_ALLOWED_PATHS.split(path.delimiter) : [];` (lines 619-620). Also used in vector-index-store.ts:918. This controls which filesystem paths are permitted for memory storage/migration — a security boundary — but ENV_REFERENCE.md has no entry for it.
fix: Add `MEMORY_ALLOWED_PATHS` to ENV_REFERENCE.md §2 (Infrastructure), documenting it as a path-delimited allowlist for memory storage paths, with security implications noted.
angle: Extend ENV_REFERENCE drift checks beyond `SPECKIT_*` tokens to non-prefixed operator envs used by 028 search paths.

title: MEMORY_BASE_PATH and MEMORY_DB_PATH storage env vars missing from ENV_REFERENCE
evidence: `const configuredMemoryRoot = process.env.MEMORY_BASE_PATH?.trim();` (context-server.ts:1550), `const runtimeDbPath = process.env.MEMORY_DB_PATH?.trim();` (config.ts:69), `export const DEFAULT_BASE_PATH: string = process.env.MEMORY_BASE_PATH || process.cwd();` (config.ts:156). These are the primary storage location overrides for the memory system. ENV_REFERENCE.md documents `SPECKIT_DB_DIR` (line 184) but omits the `MEMORY_BASE_PATH` and `MEMORY_DB_PATH` alternatives that operators might set.
fix: Add rows for `MEMORY_BASE_PATH` and `MEMORY_DB_PATH` to ENV_REFERENCE.md §2 (Infrastructure) alongside the existing `SPECKIT_DB_DIR` entry, noting their precedence relationship.
angle: Extend ENV_REFERENCE drift checks beyond `SPECKIT_*` tokens to non-prefixed operator envs used by 028 search paths.
